Quant.q: A train 150m long crosses a pole in 15 seconds. What is its speed in km/hr?
If the ratio of two numbers is 3:5 and their sum is 96, what is the larger number?
A shopkeeper marks an item 40% above cost price and gives a 20% discount. What is his overall profit percentage?
In how many ways can the letters of the word 'LEADER' be arranged?
The average of 5 consecutive integers starting from n is 20. What is n?
A can complete a work in 12 days and B in 18 days. Working together, in how many days will they finish it?
What is the compound interest on ₹10,000 at 10% per annum for 2 years, compounded annually?

Logical.q: Look at this series: 2, 6, 18, 54, ... What number should come next?
If 'CODING' is written as 'DPEJOH', how is 'PYTHON' written in the same code?
Pointing to a photograph, a man says: 'She is the daughter of my grandfather's only son.' How is the woman related to the man?
Find the odd one out: Triangle, Square, Pentagon, Circle, Hexagon
In a certain code, 'GARDEN' is coded as 'HZQEDM'. What is the coding logic applied to each letter?
options: Each letter shifted by its position

Logical.q: A is taller than B but shorter than C. D is taller than C. Who is the tallest?
Statement: All pens are pencils. All pencils are erasers. Conclusion: All pens are erasers. Is this conclusion valid?

Verbal.q: Choose the word most nearly OPPOSITE in meaning to 'DILIGENT'.
Fill in the blank: Despite the heavy rain, the team decided to ___ with the outdoor event.

options: Its raining, we should leave now.
It's raining; we should leave now.
Its' raining we should leave now.
It's raining we should, leave now.

Verbal.q: Which sentence uses the correct verb form? 'Neither the manager nor the employees ___ available today.'
Choose the option that best completes the analogy: Doctor is to Hospital as Teacher is to ___.
